topic: speculative decoding doubles tokens per second

beats.concept: serial one-token-at-a-time conveyor capped by a hard speed ceiling
techniques: serial single-file conveyor with a hard speed-ceiling hatch bar
needle-against-ceiling rate gauge (needle pinned low, taps a red ceiling marker)
single-occupancy serial lock (one active token-cell on the rail, queued tokens blocked)
one-token step-counter on the active cell (#N ticks per beat)
tokens/sec readout capped at ~1x with stuck-at-ceiling escalation

beats.concept: tiny draft model emits a guess-token batch; big verifier checks the whole batch in one sweep, accepting a green prefix run and rejecting the tail
techniques: fast draft-runner emitting a left-to-right speculative guess-token batch row (spring-pop per emit)
single-pass verifier sweep-bar traveling across the entire batch at once
contiguous green accept-streak prefix + red reject tail decided as the sweep passes each chip
accept-streak underline bracket + running accept tally
1-pass-N-tokens verifier badge with fire-impact ring on sweep launch

beats.concept: tokens/sec speedometer needle sweeps from 1x to 2x while bulk-accepted tokens fill a throughput meter to double the baseline
techniques: tokens/sec sweep speedometer (1x ghost needle held + live needle slam to 2x via spring overshoot)
x2 hero snap with rotate-settle synced to the spoken word 'doubles'
sweep-arc highlight from 1x to live rate on the dial face
bulk-accept throughput meter filling to 2x past a dashed 1x baseline marker
streaming accepted-token chip bulk-flow into the meter (index-seeded sin-hash lifecycle)
